scope: CLI provider network-env scrub policy-preservation regression coverage
full_validation: git diff --binary HEAD -- crates | git hash-object --stdin == 686dd13acbb8d7b168ab9a29b8aef54f6653a479
review: Independent reviewer reported no blockers; noted the regression is meaningful defense-in-depth coverage and intentionally not no-egress proof.
notes: The focused regression applies provider_no_public_solution_search_env and remove_network_configuration_env to the same child Command, then proves scrubbed network/proxy/package-manager variables are absent while A2D no-public-solution-search policy variables remain present.

The fitness evidence was generated with representative proxy/package-manager variables in the parent environment to keep the source-bound benchmark replay fresh for the exact crates diff; the benchmark replay itself is non-regression evidence, not network-forensics evidence.
